full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #33 (2026-05-16)

PULSE
Health: 0.4608 (C). 936 wallets, 195 contributors. 18 memos today vs 150 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
21 reward payments, 154016 PFT distributed to 14 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (30000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 8,500 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (8,500 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (60,500 PFT, avg 8,643/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rMA69k...rcQK (112 memos). Fastest new contributor: rMA69k...rcQK (28.0 memos/day in 4 days). 24 new wallet(s) this week. 34 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 78.3%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-16): 142 transactions from 26 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
